name: claude-extra-usage
description: Displays Claude extra credit usage as a percentage in the VS Code status bar.
author: Lars Wilhelmer

claudeExtraUsage.organizationId.markdownDescription: Your Claude organization ID. To view it, open https://claude.ai/settings/account.

claudeExtraUsage.sessionKey.markdownDescription: Your Claude session key. To retrieve it, open https://claude.ai, open dev tools (F12), and go to Application > Storage > Cookies > `sessionKey`.

claudeExtraUsage.refreshInterval.description: How often usage data should be refreshed (in minutes).
